gui.sparkle_morpher.config.animation_deb: Write verbose per-frame animation diagnostics to the log.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.animation_dis: Debug option: lower distant entity animation update rates to 30/15 FPS.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.animation_fra: Record per-frame animation evaluation counts and timing.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.blur_gui.desc: Frosted-glass blur behind  panels (roulette + model settings).
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.disable_exter: Disable first-person animations contributed by other mods.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.disable_loadi: Hide the loading state corner badge.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.disable_model: Shaderpack'te model parıltısını devre dışı bırak
Shaderpack etkinken özel modellerdeki parıltı efektini devre dışı bırakır.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.disable_playe: Ekstra oyuncu modelini devre dışı bırak
Disable the paper doll player preview.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.disable_self_: Hide custom hand model in first person view.
Hide your own custom  model. Uses the vanilla Steve model instead.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.input_state_d: Print [SM-INPUT] logs for left/right click, attack/use keys, vanilla swing/use state, and local animation pulses.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.loading_state: Choose where the loading state badge appears on screen.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.max_cached_gp: 0 disables GPU/native render cache trimming. Higher values keep more model render caches resident.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.model_import_: Model içe aktarma, yükleme, klasör tarama ve sunucu yeniden yükleme için [SM][Perf] sürelerini yazdırır. Yalnızca test sırasında etkinleştirin.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.model_memory_: Write model read, parse, texture, GPU mesh, and cache trim memory checkpoints to the log.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.network_onlin: Çevrimiçi oyun için ayrıntılı istemci/sunucu model senkronizasyon günlüklerini yazdırır. Yalnızca çok oyunculu senkronizasyon sorunlarını teşhis ederken etkinleştirin.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.print_animati: Animasyon rulet oynama mesajının yazdırılıp yazdırılmayacağı
Print a chat message when switching roulette animations.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.release_textu: Release Java-side PNG bytes after a texture is uploaded to the GPU.
Volume percentage for  model animation sounds.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.unused_model_: Minimum idle time before an unused model render cache can be trimmed.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.use_compatibi: Use the slower but more compatible render path.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.use_gpu_rende: Enable the experimental GPU renderer. May have compatibility issues.
gui.sparkle_morpher.config.warn_repeated: Warn when one entity is fully evaluated more than once in the same render frame.
gui.sparkle_morpher.disclaimer.read: Kullanım Şartlarını Okudum ve Kabul Ediyorum
gui.sparkle_morpher.disclaimer.text:
Thank you for using the mod, please be sure to read the relevant terms carefully and agree to the terms:


1. The download and use of the mod is completely free, and the confidentiality of the model is not guaranteed in any form

2. The dev team does not participate in the relevant model transactions, please bear the responsibility for the transaction disputes arising

3. The creator enjoys the copyright of the model created, and also bears corresponding responsibilities, which has nothing to do with the dev team

4. Please do not create any models that violate laws and regulations. This production team is also opposed to any form of R18/NSFW content creation! We have never participated in any related content creation!
Drag Green Square: Translate
Drag Blue Square: Scale
Right Drag: Rotate
Alt + R: Reset

[Press Esc To Exit]
